items.title: Air strike hit Kabul rehab centre as patients ate dinner, survivor tells BBC
items.dek: The exact number killed in Monday night's strike by Pakistan is still not known, but is feared to be in the hundreds.
items.body: The exact number killed in Monday night's strike by Pakistan is still not known, but is feared to be in the hundreds.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Morocco given AFCON title after Senegal 'forfeit'
items.dek: Morocco was stunningly awarded the Africa Cup of Nations title on Tuesday by appeals judges that overturned Senegal's victory in a chaotic final in January.
items.body: Morocco was stunningly awarded the Africa Cup of Nations title on Tuesday by appeals judges that overturned Senegal's victory in a chaotic final in January.
items.author: IriLine Desk
